rule_metadata.name: DcRat
rule_metadata.description: Detection patterns for the tool 'DcRat' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project
rule_metadata.author: @mthcht

rules.rule_text:
rule DcRat
{
	meta:
		description = "Detection patterns for the tool 'DcRat' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project"
		author = "@mthcht"
		reference = "https://github.com/mthcht/ThreatHunting-Keywords"
		tool = "DcRat"
		rule_category = "offensive_tool_keyword"
